caption: A woman with blonde-highlighted hair tied up and wearing black headphones and a black t-shirt is seated in a podcast studio. She is positioned behind a professional microphone and is smiling while touching the side of her neck with her right hand. Behind her is a white wall and a black screen displaying the word "Johnson" in red text above a graphic of a city skyline. To her right is a yellow vertical accent wall. On the right side of the scene, the text "BOSS TALK 101" is visible in red and white, accompanied by a smaller logo and the text "By 11 logo Studio". A smaller "PODCAST" logo with a microphone icon is also visible on the left. Across the sequence of frames, the woman remains in the same position, subtly shifting her facial expression and the placement of her hand on her neck while maintaining a smile.
